title: MineTech Create
description: A modpack based on create and space
body:
## What's It About?
MineTech Create is a technology-focused adventure pack that combines the creativity of [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), The exploration of [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra), the power of [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism/versions), and the precision of [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2) into one unified progression experience.
 Build massive factories, automate everything, explore enhanced worlds, and master advanced tech systems—all in a world full of discovery.

**Automation & Engineering**
MineTech Create focuses heavily on machine-based progression:
[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) – mechanical automation, kinetic engineering, moving contraptions
[Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism/versions) – energy production, ore processing, digital factories
[Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2) – storage networks, automation, digital crafting

Whether you prefer rotational power, advanced chemistry, or digital crafting grids, every tech tree has a purpose.

 **A World Worth Exploring**
Explore a rich and varied world enhanced by:
[Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith) massive new landscapes and biomes
[Biomes O’ Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) colorful environments and new regions to discover
[Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) quality-of-life world features and decoration blocks
Travel through lush forests, towering cliffs, magical valleys, and unique terrain generation that keeps every world fresh.

**Cooking & Farming**
The pack includes a range of food and farming mods that add depth to survival:
More crops.
More meals, Better farming progression

**Surviving the wilderness is more rewarding than ever.**
Designed for Creativity & Long-Term Worlds
MineTech Create is built for players who love:
Building advanced bases,
Designing large factories, Exploring beautiful terrain, working through tech progression
Playing long-term survival worlds, alone or with friends

## Credits
Credit To [Gabgabbe](https://modrinth.com/user/fjoGRNtl) And [Ludvig](https://modrinth.com/user/UEyuDyln)


## Bugs and Crashes
**Report Any Bugs Or Crashes In Our [Discord](https://discord.gg/BYZybV4QxX)!**
